text:
Re-review the spec at C:/Users/teste/Desktop/n8n/Gloria/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-22-logica-travada-respostas-design.md

The following issues from your previous review have been addressed:

CRITICAL fixes:
1. BUG-08 interaction: Added section "Fail-safe especifico para aguardando_localizacao" — fail-safe at localizacao now routes to aguardando_descricao_local instead of dead end. Also fixes the "sim without GPS" scenario.
2. Race condition: Added section "Update Retry Count: SQL direto no WF-02" — retry_count is updated via direct SQL in WF-02, not through WF-04.
3. Fail-safe SIM at localizacao: Same as #1, explicitly routes to pedir_descricao.

IMPORTANT fixes:
4. Added "Estados onde o re-prompt se aplica" section — explicitly lists the 3 states and 4 excluded states.
5. Added normalization pseudocode with regex.
6. timeout_primeiro and encaminhado_humano explicitly excluded from re-prompt.
7. Reset Teste section added with guidance on retry_count cleanup.
8. WF-01 message delivery mechanism clarified (texto plano, sem content_type especial).

SUGGESTION fixes:
11. Clarified that EXATO matching compares entire normalized input string, not word-by-word.
12. Added test T26 for aguardando_apoio re-prompt path.
Added test T27 for fail-safe at localizacao (goes to descricao_local).
Added test T28 for "sim" without GPS at localizacao.

Please re-review and return APPROVED or ISSUES FOUND.
